class.name: AbilitySystem
class.description: [AbilitySystem] is a singleton that manages the global registry of Tags for the project (v0.1.0 Stable).

method.name: get_all_registered_tags
method.description: Returns an array of all tags currently registered in the global system. This includes Name, Conditional, and Event tags from the project settings and runtime registrations.

method.name: get_component_from_node
method.description: Utility for retrieving an [ASComponent] from a node. Checks if the node is an ASC or if it has an ASC child.

method.name: get_registered_tags_of_type
method.description: Returns all tags registered in the system of a specific type.

method.name: get_resource_name_owner
method.description: Returns the instance ID of the resource that owns the given name.

method.name: get_tag_type
method.description: Returns the type classification of the given tag.

method.name: is_tag_registered
method.description: Checks if a tag is registered.

method.name: register_resource_name
method.description: Registers a unique name for a resource.

method.name: register_tag
method.description: Registers a new tag globally with a specific type.

method.name: remove_tag_branch
method.description: Unregisters the specified tag and all its hierarchical sub-tags (e.g. removing "State" will also remove "State.Stunned").

method.name: rename_tag
method.description: Renames an existing tag and automatically updates all its hierarchical sub-tags to the new prefix.

method.name: resolve_component
method.description: Advanced utility for locating an [ASComponent] from an agent node. Priority order: 1. If [param path] is provided, attempts to resolve that specific path relative to the agent. 2. If the agent node itself is an [ASComponent], returns it. 3. Searches the immediate children of the agent for an [ASComponent]. 4. Searches the parent of the agent and its children. 5. Searches the owner of the agent and its children.

method.name: run_tests
method.description: Executes the internal unit test suite for the Ability System. Returns 0 on success or the number of failed test cases. This is primarily used for CI/CD validation and development integrity checks.

method.name: tag_matches
method.description: Hierarchical tag comparison utility. Returns true if [param tag] matches [param match_against]. If [param exact] is true, it performs an exact string match.

signal.name: tags_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the registered tags are changed.
